topic: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among)

tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The book is on the table. The cat is under the table. We are in the room. I will come at 5 pm. My birthday is in January.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The meeting is on Monday. The lamp is over the table. This book is between mine and yours. This competition is among three teams. We live in Delhi.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "वह दरवाज़े पर खड़ा है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: He is standing at the door.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "I will come at 5 pm yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The children are playing in the garden. My meeting is at 10 am. We travel in summer. His wedding is on Friday.
